_title: Retrospective NR-V04-inspired three-paralogue ternary benchmark (Track B) — spec
_goal: The higher-value method contribution (gate-AI, 2026-07-11): can a BLINDED, ENSEMBLE-based ternary workflow recover the EXPERIMENTALLY KNOWN NR4A1-selective degradation geometry of NR-V04 and distinguish it from the NOT-degraded NR4A2/NR4A3 assemblies? NR-V04 is the FAMILY-MATCHED POSITIVE CONTROL the de-novo NR4A3 system lacks. Only if the workflow passes THIS control do we trust it to rank a prospective NR4A3 degrader.
_status: SPEC (2026-07-11). Structure validated; harness build + single-leg-first pilot = next.

ground_truth.source: Wang et al. J Exp Med 2024;221(3):e20231519 (PMID 38334978); MedChemExpress NR-V04
ground_truth.mechanism_evidence: selective degradation + PLA/co-IP NR4A1-VHL complex + VHL/proteasome dependence. NOTE (justified vs unjustified inference): this proves family-selective degradation is ACHIEVABLE; it does NOT prove the selectivity is CAUSED by ternary geometry (no solved ternary structure, no matched cross-paralogue cooperativity). So a workflow RECOVERING the NR4A1 preference is supportive-but-not-proof of the geometric hypothesis.
ground_truth.the_test: A workflow that cannot recover NR4A1>>NR4A2/NR4A3 for the KNOWN degrader must not be trusted to discover NR4A3 selectivity de-novo.

nrv04.architecture: celastrol (warhead, via its solvent-exposed C-28 carboxylic acid) -- amide -- 4-PEG linker -- amide -- VH032-class VHL ligand (two amide bonds; NR-V04 = the 4-PEG variant, most potent; Wang 2024).
nrv04.structure_caveat: REPRESENTATIVE, not a verified DB structure: warhead (celastrol, InChIKey KQJSQWZMSAGSHN) + linker length (4-PEG, two amides) + VHL-ligand class are from the paper's DESCRIBED composition; the exact VH032 connectivity/regiochemistry is my reconstruction. The ChEMBL record named 'NR-V04' (CHEMBL4779766) is a DIFFERENT (CRBN/glutarimide) compound and is NOT used (see published-warhead-registry.md). Linker length is a benchmark VARIABLE (scan) per the E3/linker-sensitivity readout.

vhl_ligand_vh032.note: hydroxyproline VHL recruiter; trans-OH required, epimer = inactive control

linker.note: NR-V04 = 4-PEG; also synthesize inactive-recruiter + free-warhead controls

e3.context: VHL functions in the VBC complex (ElonginB P62258 + ElonginC Q15369); include EloB/C context if the co-fold supports it, else VHL alone as a first pass

controls.vhl_positive: VHL (+EloB/C) + VH032 ALONE — does the workflow seat the hydroxyproline ligand in VHL's pocket? (the VHL analogue of the CRBN+lenalidomide control; if it fails, distrust every VHL ternary).
controls.inactive_recruiter: epimerized VH032 (cis-hydroxyproline) — should NOT recruit VHL; a negative control the workflow should score worse.

ensemble_readouts: accessible ternary-complex populations (iPTM / ligand-iPTM / confidence DISTRIBUTION across N seeds, not one pose)
linker strain (PEG conformational energy in the bound pose)
target-VHL interface: buried area + shape/chemical complementarity
PPI-interface stability / consistency across seeds + starting models (persistence)
predicted cooperativity / relative ternary stability (paralogue vs paralogue)
lysine presentation: solvent-exposed target Lys in a ubiquitination-compatible geometry relative to VHL/CRL4-E2~Ub (proxy only)
paralogue counterexamples (a seed/pose where NR4A2 or NR4A3 forms a BETTER geometry than NR4A1)

single_leg_first_pilot.rule: CLAUDE.md: pilot one leg for its RESULT before fanning out an abortable multi-leg spend.
single_leg_first_pilot.pilot: Run FIRST, cheaply: (1) the VHL+VH032 positive control, and (2) the NR4A1 ternary (the KNOWN-degraded case) across a few seeds.
single_leg_first_pilot.abort_if: the control cannot seat VH032 in VHL (workflow broken), OR the NR4A1 (known-degraded) ternary cannot form a productive, seed-persistent geometry — because then the workflow cannot even recover the positive case and the full NR4A1/2/3 x seeds x linkers fleet would be wasted spend.
single_leg_first_pilot.proceed_if: control validates AND NR4A1 forms a productive, reproducible ternary geometry -> THEN fan out to NR4A2 + NR4A3 (x seeds x linker variants) and compare paralogues.

verdict_gate.informative: reproducible signal consistent with NR4A1-favoured degradation geometry (NR4A1 > NR4A2/NR4A3 on the ensemble readouts) -> use the workflow comparatively for prospective NR4A3 architectures.
verdict_gate.inconclusive: plausible complexes but cannot distinguish paralogues -> use for geometry generation ONLY, not selectivity ranking.
verdict_gate.failed: favours the wrong paralogue or is initialization-dominated -> do NOT interpret predicted NR4A3 ternary selectivity (this limits the METHOD, not the NR-V04 experiment).

reuse: extends nr4a3_ternary.py / gpu-ternary-aws.yml / boltz_src (Boltz-2 --no_kernels, validated). Changes: E3 CRBN->VHL (+EloB/C); PROTAC = NR-V04 (above); N-seed ensembles; the readouts above; report_ternary.py interface mode extended for VHL + cross-paralogue ranking.

control_ligand.name: VH032
control_ligand.role: VHL positive-control ligand (the VHL analogue of the CRBN+lenalidomide control)
control_ligand.provenance: literature VH032 VHL ligand entered from its known structure; RDKit-validated (formula/MW match) and its (2S,4R)-4-hydroxyproline + 4-(4-methylthiazol-5-yl)phenyl VHL warhead matches the structure-verified NR-V04 representative SMILES (shared HasSubstructMatch). Used because VH032 does NOT resolve by pref_name in ChEMBL and PubChem name-lookup is unreliable from the job container, which silently skipped the control in the first two pilot runs.

control_vh032.note: VH032 seats in VHL hydroxyproline pocket (S111/H115/W117/Y98/H110) all seeds

productive_ternary_bridging.detail: NR4A1: NR-V04 contacts both NR4A1 (2.4-3.3 A) and VHL (2.3-2.6 A) every seed. NR4A2/NR4A3: warhead seats in VHL (2.0-2.6 A) but target LBD is 6-26 A away -> ligand bound to VHL only, no productive ternary in any seed.

exposed_lys_to_vhl_A_mean.note: ubiquitin-reach proxy orders correctly: degraded NR4A1 presents the closest exposed Lys to VHL

ligand_iptm_mean.note: INVERTS (spared NR4A2 highest) — ligand-iPTM scores the confidently-placed VHL-warhead half regardless of whether the ternary forms; NOT a valid ternary-selectivity metric on its own.

result.verdict_basis: EXPLORATORY concordance in ONE retrospective example on the MOIETY-SPECIFIC readout: NR4A1 moiety-bridges 0.67 of samples vs NR4A2/NR4A3 0.0, cutoff-robust + survives leave-one-seed-out. NOT validation; NOT evidence geometry causes the phenotype. n=3 samples with one NR4A1 wrong-end artefact -> thin.
caveats: retrospective n=1 (single positive control, NR-V04); encouraging but not a robust predictor
NR-V04 selectivity is FOR NR4A1; designing NR4A3 selectivity is a different problem (different paralogue, warhead, interface) — this makes an NR4A3 program credible, does not transfer directly
Boltz co-fold + --no_kernels; single linker (NR-V04's 4-PEG); no explicit E3-choice/linker-length scan yet; VHL modeled as VBC (VHL+EloB/C), CRL4/E2~Ub not modeled (Lys reach is a proxy)
result.lys_to_vhl_caveat: MISNAMED as 'exposed Lys' — the analyzer takes every modeled Lys NZ and its min distance to VHL, WITHOUT any solvent-accessibility (SASA) calculation. The per-seed ordering is inconsistent (NR4A2 is closer than NR4A1 in 2/3 paired seeds; the NR4A1<NR4A2<NR4A3 order appears only after averaging highly variable values, NR4A1 5.5 A mean with one seed ~9.7 A). REMOVED from the concordance argument; retained only as a crude ubiquitination-ACCESSIBILITY proxy pending SASA + Cullin-RING/E2~Ub geometry.
result.ligand_iptm_conclusion: Ligand-iPTM did NOT reproduce the known degradation ordering in THIS benchmark and should not be used ALONE to rank paralogue-selective ternaries. (Narrowed from the withdrawn categorical claim 'global confidence scores are not a valid ternary-selectivity metric' — that generalizes beyond one compound, one E3, three paralogues, three top-ranked predictions. The 'rewards the well-placed VHL half' mechanism is an INTERPRETATION, not established.)
result.metric_switch_disclosure: Productive geometry was a PRE-SPECIFIED EXPLORATORY readout; its elevation to the primary interpretive endpoint occurred AFTER ligand-iPTM failed to recover the phenotype. Transparent exploratory analysis, not a pre-specified primary metric.

moiety_specific_bridging.NR4A1_degraded: 2/3 samples (whole-ligand 3/3 OVER-COUNTED: 1 seed was a wrong-end artefact, wrong_end 0.33)
moiety_specific_bridging.note: Correct-ends test (celastrol->NR4A AND VH032->VHL): NR4A1 0.67 vs spared 0.0/0.0. Thinner than the whole-ligand read (n=3, one NR4A1 wrong-end artefact) -> expanded sampling (>3 seeds, all poses) + negative controls required before any downstream ranking.

result.metric_name: correct-half dual-surface proximity (NOT 'productive geometry'; NOT chemically-mapped occupancy)
result.headline: Structure-only gross architecture classifier: thin retrospective concordance (NR4A1 2/3 seeds vs spared 0/3) BUT failed an affinity-sensitive stereochemical control (inactive epimer passed at the same aggregate rate, 0.75) -> unsuitable for prospective affinity/degradation-selectivity/linker ranking.

review_required_fixes.review: external methods review, 2026-07-11 — Return for revision; hold full GPU campaign
before_any_prospective_ranking: moiety-specific occupancy: VH032-substructure in the canonical VHL pocket; celastrol-substructure at the intended NR4A site; detect wrong-end / linker-mediated / nonspecific-surface contacts (current bridge test is whole-ligand min-distance and can pass on wrong-end contacts)
celastrol electrophile <-> NR4A1 Cys551 distance+orientation as a covalent-geometry proxy (or model covalently)
linker strain + steric clashes + protein-protein interface contacts
rename/replace 'exposed Lys': compute solvent-accessible Lys; label as crude ubiquitination-accessibility proxy only

analyze ALL generated ranks/samples, not model_0 only; >3 seeds; bridge fractions WITH uncertainty; cutoff-sensitivity 4.0/4.5/5.0 A; leave-one-seed-out robustness; avoid 'population'/'cooperativity' language
verify EXACT NR-V04 chemical graph/stereo/attachment points/linker atom count (independently checked), not a representative reconstruction
controls: inactive VHL-recruiter (cis/epimer), free celastrol/warhead, and ideally NR-V02/NR-V03 linker variants as a limited linker-sensitivity test
review_required_fixes.capped_pilot_only_after_fixes: 2-3 chemically diverse candidate linkers x all 3 paralogues, fixed balanced compute, additional seeds, ALL poses, scoring rule + failure criteria FROZEN before opening NR4A3 results. Full-scale ranking only if the corrected NR-V04 benchmark RETAINS separation under moiety-specific geometry, controls, expanded sampling, and cutoff-sensitivity.

frozen_criteria.frozen: 2026-07-11 (before expanded-sampling + negative-control re-run; before any prospective linker)
frozen_criteria.primary_metric: moiety-specific bridging fraction at 4.5 A (celastrol-end<=4.5 A of NR4A AND VH032-end<=4.5 A of VHL)
frozen_criteria.failure: any of: NR4A1 does not separate; NR4A1 wrong_end>=0.5; not cutoff-robust; a negative control DOES bridge NR4A1
frozen_criteria.downstream_gate: prospective linker ranking proceeds ONLY if the expanded corrected benchmark PASSES all of the above

free_celastrol.role: NEGATIVE control — warhead only, no VHL recruiter; must NOT form a productive NR4A1 ternary
free_celastrol.provenance: celastrol connectivity from the verified NR-V04 warhead (C-28 acid free); RDKit-validated (C29H38O4/450.6)

inactive_vhl_recruiter_epimer.note: NEGATIVE control — VH032 with the (2S,4R)->(2S,4S) 4-hydroxyproline EPIMER (the 'cis' isomer that does not bind VHL); as a PROTAC (celastrol-linker-epimer) it must NOT recruit VHL. Standalone epimer InChIKey JAHUHEDUDMTTTF-ROZPXGAXSA-N (same connectivity block as active VH032 ...-COWZOJLOSA-N, different stereo). The full inactive PROTAC = NR-V04 SMILES with the hydroxyproline stereocentre inverted.

inactive_nrv04_protac.role: NEGATIVE control PROTAC — full NR-V04 with the 4-hydroxyproline epimerised (VHL-inactive cis); must NOT recruit VHL / must NOT form a productive NR4A1 ternary
inactive_nrv04_protac.provenance: NR-V04 representative SMILES with the Hyp (2S,4R)->(2S,4S) stereocentre inverted; RDKit: same connectivity block as active NR-V04 (ADEXNWCZOWYLJV-WOMBUDSUSA-N), different stereo block

negative_control_shakeout.finding: The distance-based moiety-bridging readout captures GROSS one gross architectural failure (no recruiter) detected — NOT specificity (free celastrol, which lacks a VHL handle, correctly fails to bridge) but NOT fine BINDING-AFFINITY specificity: the VHL-inactive hydroxyproline EPIMER PROTAC — which differs from active NR-V04 by a single stereocentre that abolishes VHL binding experimentally — is achieved the SAME aggregate bridge fraction as the active PROTAC (0.75 vs 0.75). A co-fold predicts a STRUCTURE, not affinity, so a geometry-only readout cannot distinguish a well-placed non-binder from a real binder.
negative_control_shakeout.implication: Per the frozen criteria this is a FAILED negative control -> the productive-geometry readout must NOT be used to RANK prospective linkers on affinity/binding. It can flag whether a linker geometry CAN bridge (architecture triage), but binding must be established by a SEPARATE affinity method (recruiter FEP/ABFE or docking), not the co-fold geometry. This BLOCKS a geometry-only prospective ranking campaign — the gate's concern (fix 6) was correct.
negative_control_shakeout.caveat: n=4 shakeout; the full expanded run (more seeds x all poses) is dispatched to confirm robustly.

chemical_identity.status: NR-V04-INSPIRED REPRESENTATIVE RECONSTRUCTION — NOT an exact match to the published NR-V04
chemical_identity.blocker: Before this can serve as an EXACT retrospective benchmark against the reported NR-V04 phenotype, obtain the exact structure from primary supplementary chemistry / patent / author source and independently validate graph, stereochemistry, linker length, exit vectors; derive the matched inactive epimer from THAT exact graph. Until then it is an 'NR-V04-inspired representative reconstruction' and the manuscript/spec must say so throughout.
chemical_identity.action: attempt primary-source verification (Wang 2024, PMC10857906) via a CI full-text fetch; else keep the representative label

_superseded_language.note: The 2026-07-11 external reviews narrowed this benchmark to an EXPLORATORY, structure-only, gross architecture classifier. The following earlier terms elsewhere in this file are SUPERSEDED and must not be read as claims: 'BLINDED', 'structure validated'/'verified', 'accessible ternary-complex populations', 'predicted cooperativity', 'productive geometry', 'validated lens', 'informative'. Ensemble iPTM/ligand-iPTM are confidence scores, NOT population or cooperativity estimates; the contact metric is renamed 'correct-half dual-surface proximity' (see result.metric_name).

members: active VH032 recruiter vs its 4-hydroxyproline epimer (VHL-inactive)
affinity_negatives.purpose: MUST be evaluated by a separate AFFINITY method (FEP/ABFE), NOT the structure-only contact classifier
affinity_negatives.status: the epimer is an AFFINITY negative; the structure-only classifier CANNOT see it (it passed the classifier at the same rate as active) — this is the decisive failed control.

members: linker or recruiter removed (free celastrol = no-recruiter)
any construct expected not to span both proteins
architecture_negatives.purpose: the ONLY negatives the structure-only architecture classifier is entitled to be judged against
architecture_negatives.status: free celastrol (no VHL handle) is an architecture negative and correctly fails to span; it needs its OWN no-recruiter readout, NOT the moiety fallback.

controls_scheme_v2.rule: keep the ORIGINAL frozen result as a FAILED control; do not rewrite history. Version this new scheme separately.

review_required_fixes_v2.review: 2nd external methods review, 2026-07-11 — Return for revision; spot conversion approved separately

blocking_before_rerun.chem_identity: exact NR-V04 graph/stereo/attachment/linker from primary source, or keep 'representative' label
blocking_before_rerun.atom_map_moiety: DONE (2026-07-11): atom_map_moieties() maps SMILES<->CIF (atom-order identity verified by exact element-sequence equality, else bond-perception fallback, else fail-closed); SMARTS-defined warhead/recruiter/linker; archived mapping; never whole-ligand fallback
blocking_before_rerun.intended_site_occupancy: DONE (2026-07-11): recruiter-in-VHL-Hyp-pocket occupancy, warhead-at-NR4A (site flagged undefined), linker-only/nonspecific flag, steric clashes (<2.0A), crude linker-strain proxy — all separate fields; end-to-end gemmi CIF path PENDING real-CIF forced-restart smoke (validated only via unit-tested numeric core so far; gemmi absent in dev sandbox)
blocking_before_rerun.cys551: map UniProt NR4A1 551 -> local LBD index programmatically, verify residue identity, test on an actual output CIF; until then say covalent geometry NOT evaluated
blocking_before_rerun.controls: separate architecture negatives (short/no linker, wrong vector, no recruiter) from affinity negatives (epimer via a separate affinity method); free-celastrol gets its own no-recruiter readout
blocking_before_rerun.pseudoreplication: seed = primary sampling unit; pose fraction = within-seed summary; identical seeds/settings across systems; paired seed-level contrasts; resample SEEDS not poses; report BOTH seed_n and pose_n in every denominator
blocking_before_rerun.paired_negative_records: store full per-seed/rank records for negatives (not just aggregate); paired active-vs-epimer table (bridge state, pocket contacts, pose RMSD/contact-map sim, confidence, failure reason)
blocking_before_rerun.pilot_not_evaluated: a missing-by-design control (fan-out/targets mode) must report 'not-evaluated', NOT ABORT/'workflow suspect'

spot_reproducibility_before_rerun: immutable run-scoped S3 prefix (do NOT mix old+new predictions)
test spot restore by forced interruption of a smoke job
report REALIZED spot savings (workload/availability-dependent, up to ~90%), not an assumed 60-70%

authorization.expanded_rerun: conditional — only after chem-identity, atom-map, site-occupancy, Cys551, seed-level stats are corrected; as DESCRIPTIVE characterization, NOT a rescue of the ranking gate
authorization.prospective_pilot: NOT approved; only under modified-A after a separate affinity method passes the active-vs-epimer control

still_pending: #1 primary-source exact NR-V04 structure (else 'representative' label stands)
#9 remainder: immutable per-run S3 prefix convention, forced-restart spot-restore smoke, realized-savings reporting

DONE_in_code: run_provenance.json stamp (resolved commit+boltz spec+args+prefix) written to output
operational_pre_rerun: use an IMMUTABLE per-run S3 OUTPUT_PREFIX (e.g. nrv04-corrected-YYYYMMDD-<tag>); never reuse a prefix across runs
forced-restart spot-restore smoke (interrupt a smoke job; confirm resume from /opt/ml/checkpoints) — negligible capped GPU
report REALIZED savings via list-sagemaker mode=savings (billable vs training hours), not an assumed %

real_cif_smoke_acceptance: an actual Boltz-2.2.1 CIF parsed by gemmi
expected ligand chain + heavy-atom count found
atom map archived AND chemically graph-consistent (element-sequence equality is a corruption pre-filter ONLY, not acceptance)
VHL Hyp-pocket residues found and occupancy evaluable
one complete report JSON generated after a FORCED spot restart (resume from /opt/ml/checkpoints)
